_comment: CICADA — Takehara Falls (gym 1, Bug) leader intro. Camera path RECORDED IN-WORLD (/cutscene record, promoted 2026-07-23) — this scene is now ABSOLUTE (was the shared relative+facingFrame leader_intro geometry; only Cicada's copy is converted, the other leaders keep their facingFrame copies). Frames Cicada over the open-top floor-1 arena (floor 2055.5/138/2460.5) and holds. endBack is 0: positioning for the battle is done explicitly by battle.stage_pos on the takehara_leader character (compiler emits `tp @s 2055.5 138 2473.5 facing entity <cicada>` in gym/engage_takehara_leader before the battle opens). startTitle names her; the bug-type effect burst (happy_villager + sculk_soul) is ANCHORED ON CICADA'S uuid body (execute at c577141c-…) so it lands on her wherever cicada_float left her. Cues re-timed to the 70-tick recorded duration.

cues.command: execute at c577141c-305f-4c20-a6bb-444d3b4d5ae0 run particle minecraft:happy_villager ~ ~1 ~ 0.7 0.9 0.7 0.02 40 force
execute at c577141c-305f-4c20-a6bb-444d3b4d5ae0 run particle minecraft:sculk_soul ~ ~1 ~ 0.5 0.8 0.5 0.01 24 force
